notes.text: Replace every 2 years based on vehicle production date or during the scheduled brake fluid service.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.

taxonomy.literalName: Brake Hydraulic System Drain, Refill & Bleed

notes.text: Change engine air filter at every 2nd oil change.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.

Check tread depth, wear pattern, outer condition, and inflation pressure. Correct pressure if necessary.

Visually inspect all SRS airbag units for torn covers, obvious damage, or attachment of stickers.

Check turn signals, back up lights, and license plate lights. Includes interior lighting, map, reading, glovebox, and luggage area lights.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Check for clearance, leaks, damage, and wear.

Check all visible parts such as the transmission, rear axle, fuel lines, and exhaust system. Check for damage, leaks, and corrosion.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Also check the intensive cleaning system. Check protection level and fluid level. Top up if necessary.
Check washer jet positions.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
During road test, do a final check of: brakes, steering, shock absorbers(visual), and the transmission.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
Also check horn, headlight flashers and hazard warning flashers. Check all instrument and control lighting. Check heater/air conditioning blower operation.
Also check rear view mirrors.
Open convertible top or retractable hard top. Activate the automatic rollover protection system  via OBD diagnostic link.
Verify Check Control messages. Check indicator and warning lights. Reset CBS display. Inspect tires, adjust tire pressures and reset the Tire Pressure Monitor.
